evidence_summary: Case created from operator directive to fix conversation pipeline. 7 research/audit agents dispatched.

7 agents returned: daemon crash-loop root cause (asyncio starvation via synchronous urllib), broadcast routing paradox (resolve_playback_decision blocks conversational responses), Stream Deck routing disconnect, TTS swap plan (Kokoro→Chatterbox Turbo), S-4 voice modulation chain design, non-anthropomorphic voice design. Plan draft written.

Spec written at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-17-voice-pipeline-repair-design.md. 7 root causes identified with empirical evidence from audit agents. 5 tracks, 16 tasks, 19h estimated. Presence fix already implemented and tested by audit agent.

All 5 axioms satisfied: single_user (serves operator), executive_function (reduces cognitive load), corporate_boundary (all local), interpersonal_transparency (consent loaded), management_governance (authority case gates implementation). No violations.

Plan accepted. 5 tracks, 16 tasks, 19h. All root causes empirically identified. Presence fix already verified by audit agent (7 evdev tests + 14 presence regression tests pass). Ready for implementation authorization.

ISAP accepted. implementation_authorized=true, source_mutation_authorized=true, axiom_compliance_checked=true. Plan: 5 tracks, 16 tasks. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-17-voice-pipeline-repair-design.md. Ready for CC-task creation and implementation.
